article_title: Chelsea’s Reece James an England World Cup doubt with hamstring injury

tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Joan Laporta is re-elected as Barcelona president, winning 68.18% of the vote against Victor Font! He celebrated with players after their 5-2 victory over Sevilla. 🎉⚽️ #FCBarcelona #Laporta2026
article_title: Laporta shrugs off the flak and cruises to re-election as Barcelona president | Sid Lowe

tweet_text: 🚨 Iran negotiating with FIFA to move their World Cup games from the US to Mexico due to safety concerns for players. Discussions arise after US airstrikes and Trump’s comments on their participation. 🇮🇷⚽ #WorldCup2026 #IranFootball
article_title: Iran say they are negotiating with Fifa to move their World Cup games to Mexico
